personalInfo.name: Saurabh Maurya
personalInfo.title: Software Engineer
personalInfo.bio: Software engineer specializing in scalable systems, observability, and full-stack development. Passionate about performance optimization, clean architecture, and solving complex engineering problems.

currentRole.title: Associate Member of Technical Staff
responsibilities: Engineered a dependency extraction system for OmniStudio metadata, reducing deployment time by 90%
Implemented lean Vega Cache architecture, reducing cache size by 50–70% without impacting performance
Improved accessibility of OmniStudio components to meet compliance standards
Developed scalable backend and frontend solutions using modern frameworks

experience.title: Associate Member of Technical Staff
highlights: Built dependency extraction system enabling automated resolution of inter-component dependencies
Reduced deployment time by 90% through metadata system improvements
Optimized caching architecture achieving significant memory savings
Enhanced accessibility and usability of enterprise UI components

experience.title: Software Development Intern
highlights: Designed 20+ Grafana dashboards for monitoring high-volume payment systems
Implemented Alertmanager pipelines with Slack integration reducing detection time to under 10 minutes
Integrated 6+ custom Prometheus metrics improving observability
Enhanced real-time system reliability through monitoring improvements

education.university: Indian Institute of Technology (IIT BHU), Varanasi
